body:
A Billings attorney is the first Democrat to declare, but certainly will not be the last leftist Democrat lining up to take me on next year. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43986740:s5z_47ENB:m:1:1494336505:409E3058FDFF772EFEB6D9E440858B93:r)
---
Friend,

Just weeks after our historic victory in the Montana Congressional Special Election race to succeed now Secretary of the Interior Ryan Zinke, we already have Democrats leveling their 2018 challenges against me.

_That's right, Friend_. A Billings attorney is the first Democrat to declare, but certainly will not be the last leftist Democrat lining up to take me on next year. And unlike every other member of Congress running for reelection, we are just coming off a bruising campaign and we must immediately face another race.

I am counting on my strongest supporters to help me - once again before the end of August.

**[Will you take action now to ensure we can face the growing challenge and prepare for an intense year of defending our principles and spreading our message to the voters of Montana with your generous End of Month Contribution to Gianforte for Congress now?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43986740:s5z_47ENB:m:1:1494336505:409E3058FDFF772EFEB6D9E440858B93:r)**

| [** Friend's August-End
Contribution **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43986740:s5z_47ENB:m:1:1494336505:409E3058FDFF772EFEB6D9E440858B93:r)
---

Friend, millions were spent in the first half of 2017 to defeat me, but Nancy Pelosi and liberals from D.C. failed. They are going to do whatever they can this year and next to make sure they don't fail again.

But with one of the most targeted races in the nation last year, we had to spend our campaign war chest to fight back against the left's attacks. Especially NOW, with less than 48 hours to go this month, **[we need an additional $5,325 to make up the difference before time runs out at midnight Thursday night.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43986740:s5z_47ENB:m:1:1494336505:409E3058FDFF772EFEB6D9E440858B93:r)**

**[Friend, can I count on you to help us chip away at our goal? $10, $25, $50, $100 or more- _whatever you can swing_ - will help!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43986740:s5z_47ENB:m:1:1494336505:409E3058FDFF772EFEB6D9E440858B93:r)**

Sincerely,

Greg Gianforte

P.S. To lay the groundwork for a successful defense, we need a big push during these last hours of August to get back in the game! **[Please make your strong August gift now.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43986740:s5z_47ENB:m:1:1494336505:409E3058FDFF772EFEB6D9E440858B93:r)**

name: The White House
subject: The Strength and Resilience of the People of Texas
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c24a5e01c8ae0ed13fdb6e6ec15f3960eebe46420dbc1096f800547cd8948b2d3564cb0fdec0b8744f932975907ead5e05113a2df960470

-------------

Hurricane Harvey Relief Efforts Continue

Yesterday, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump traveled to Texas where they received a briefing on Hurricane Harvey relief efforts with local leadership and relief organizations. The President and the First Lady also met with state leadership at the Emergency Operations Center.

Statement by First Lady Melania Trump on Hurricane Harvey
"The effects of Hurricane Harvey will be felt in Texas, Louisiana, and other parts of the country for many months and years to come. So far, 1.7 million people are under orders to evacuate their homes, and, as the floodwater in Houston rises, sadly, so will the number of evacuees.

I want to be able to offer my help and support in the most productive way possible, not through just words, but also action. What I found to be the most profound during the visit was not only the strength and resilience of the people of Texas, but the compassion and sense of community that has taken over the State. My thoughts and prayers continue to be with the people of Texas and Louisiana." - First Lady Melania Trump

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c24a5e01c8ae0ed7cd194a553850da1808ec46142d2b5ba16e8628549afd0493ace2956b50d33b208cf72374246160e8a3fd0ce7215f31f
Read more

A New Era of Economic Renewal

Today, President Trump will announce a tax reform plan in Springfield, Missouri, that puts the American worker and American economy first. Tax reform will spur a new era of economic renewal to bring back our jobs, bring back our wealth, and bring back our dreams.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c24a5e01c8ae0ed85793df41c3abfedc87329d79f40d542381c311dc2540b0c8ffe294b58d8f45fab925192ca5270a99b8337359e16b572
Watch the Announcement Live at 2:30pm EDT

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump, Senator John Cornyn, and Senator Ted Cruz | August 29, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS and VP Today

Today, President Trump will travel to Springfield, Missouri, and participate in a tax reform kickoff event.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c24a5e01c8ae0ed85793df41c3abfedc87329d79f40d542381c311dc2540b0c8ffe294b58d8f45fab925192ca5270a99b8337359e16b572
Watch the Announcement Live at 2:30pm EDT

Today, Vice President Pence will travel to White Sulphur Springs, West Virginia, where he will deliver keynote remarks to the 2017 Annual Meeting and Business Summit of the West Virginia Chamber of Commerce.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c24a5e01c8ae0ede175a057ce37892b411e285a5e5cc670e2d4125765492e8457b5395a57bb9f767650ec730556bf339ddcc20957ad0b49
Listen Live at 7:00pm EDT

White House Spring Internship

The application for the Spring 2018 White House Internship Program is open!
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c24a5e01c8ae0edcfda0530788e5428b906f5be012347bac0e62bc3c33deb07492ee723435de0b0df095e7f81f695e313c111a27efbaf77
Apply here

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c24a5e01c8ae0ed68ef5a717983849d2cec9f1fb6e37ca9f40156813091733c04b5f82615d0d0fb9df13c71a0ccfcbd33f5f9e2cbabf0c8
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c24a5e01c8ae0edf78d35d5165a9cec1a055b1b8fe46e9d43648feedbb87eb6282f50ee7fdf002e921c96218a9c2425b43eba73c9708dee
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d456e3f205869ebdd505a3523c7c434448c8837dc878add4b50a5bd86f7650289ab98521901bd6854c49b48d4159753d4d

We wanted to make sure that you saw Gov. Kasich's email.

Peter, we wanted to make sure
that you saw Gov. Kasich's email.

Let's do what we can to help our
fellow Americans!

-Team Kasich

--
From: Gov. John Kasich
To: Peter
Subject: Let's try something
different

It's the end of the month, which
means you're about to get a flood of political fundraising
emails.

And while ours has financial
needs just like every other political organization, I'd like to
propose that we try something different this month:

The brave citizens of Texas and
other southern regions of America are facing a real crisis right
now with Hurricane Harvey. Let's put aside the politics for a
while and do what we can to help them out.

Here's how you can chip in right
now:

Donate to the American Red Cross
(here)

-or-
Phone: Call 1-800-REDCROSS or
Text: HARVEY to 90999 to make a $10 donation
-or-
Donate to the Salvation Army
(here)

I was a guest on NBC's Meet the
Press Sunday and spoke about the need for all Americans to pull
together to help each other out - especially in times of crisis
like a natural disaster.

Please take a moment to watch and
share this clip to help us get this message out:

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!

-John

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

name: Donna Brazile
subject: Derek, this is a call to action.
body:
Step up before tomorrow's deadline.
---
**We need 49 Democrats from your community to step up before tomorrow at midnight if we're going to hit our August fundraising goal. Can you chip in $3 or more today?

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523632/4067b0a/3e17320d6/7e6ef7a3/920255739/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170830_db_nd&source=em_20170830_db_nd&refcode=em_20170830_db_nd")**

Derek --

Donald Trump and his cronies are out of control, and it feels like they're testing us in new ways every day. Sometimes I have to remind myself to breathe.

But I'm keeping the faith, Derek. When I look at this party and the grassroots movement we're building all over the country, I'm inspired. I know we have what it takes to get our country back on track.

I'll be honest with you, though -- right now, we're at a serious disadvantage. We're being outraised and outspent by the GOP, and it's a big problem.

[**So if you've got an extra $3, I need you to give it to Democrats before the big fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow.**](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523632/4067b0a/3e17320d6/7e6ef7a0/920255739/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+So+if+youve+got+an+extra+3+I+need+you+to&utm_campaign=em_20170830_db_nd&source=em_20170830_db_nd&refcode=em_20170830_db_nd")

You're doing so much important work in your communities to lift up Democratic candidates and resist Trump and the GOP agenda. I don't want to undervalue that, because it's so important.

But running and winning a close campaign isn't cheap. Building new, better tools and hiring organizers isn't free. If we can't close the gap, it'll be that much harder to support all the Democrats who are running for office at every level this year and in 2018.

Derek, I'm asking you to pitch in $3 or whatever you can today to help us hit our end-of-month fundraising goal. We need 49 more supporters in your community to step up before midnight tomorrow, and I hope you can be one of them.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523632/4067b0a/3e17320d6/7e6ef7a1/920255739/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/august-Deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170830_db_nd&source=em_20170830_db_nd&refcode=em_20170830_db_nd")

[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523632/4067b0a/3e17320d6/7e6ef7ac/920255739/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/august-Deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170830_db_nd&source=em_20170830_db_nd&refcode=em_20170830_db_nd")

name: Donnelly for Indiana
subject: Just got off the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---

| | Peter,

We're so fresh off the road that the engine is still warm on the RV. We ended our whirlwind 6-day tour the same way it began: with Joe talking to Hoosiers about what matters to them and his plans to continue fighting for our veterans, our seniors, and Indiana families. But this race got even hotter while we were driving.

Take a look:
> **_FIRST:_** CNN called Joe the "third most likely to lose" right before we hit the road.
> **_THEN:_** The _Cook Political Report_ declared Joe's race a pure "toss up" as we were on the tour.
> **_NOW:_** We're headed into our first big end-of-month deadline since we kicked off this campaign and we could really use your help.
**Will you pitch in now to help us meet our first end-of-month deadline since kicking off the campaign? Our goal is 500 donors by midnight tomorrow.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27ae/7377f838/37c81d3f/51fbc340/3419512338/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?express_lane=true&refcode=20170830nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27ae/7377f838/37c81d3f/51fbc343/3419512338/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?express_lane=true&refcode=20170830nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27ae/7377f838/37c81d3f/51fbc342/3419512338/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?express_lane=true&refcode=20170830nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27ae/7377f838/37c81d3f/51fbc0bd/3419512338/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?express_lane=true&refcode=20170830nd&amount=100")**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27ae/7377f838/37c81d3f/51fbc0bc/3419512338/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?refcode=20170830nd")****
Making a strong showing right now is critical, Peter. Our opponents and their big-money GOP donors would love to put a "yes man" for the Trump/Pence agenda in Indiana's seat -- and they've already spent millions this year to do it.

**You know as well as we do that nobody works harder for Hoosiers than Joe.** With your support, he played a crucial role in blocking the recent health care overhaul, fought to defend public education from being gutted, advocated for our servicemembers and veterans, and worked to fund programs to get Hoosiers back to work.

Now Joe needs you to step up because this campaign is powered by the people -- not special interests. **We 've got a long, expensive road to Election Day, and we need to show everyone what the Indiana grassroots can do.**

**[Can we count on you to pitch in $5 and help us meet our goal of 500 donors before midnight tomorrow?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27ae/7377f838/37c81d3f/51fbc0bf/3419512338/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?refcode=20170830nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,

Team Donnelly

****[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27ae/7377f838/37c81d3f/51fbc0be/3419512338/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?refcode=20170830nd&amount=25")****

body:
Friend,

**27 days.** That's all the time we have left before the special election for a critical state Senate seat.

Republicans know it's a make-or-break election for them. Losing this seat would be a humiliating defeat for Donald Trump and Rick Scott's extreme agenda.

Now, the GOP is hitting up every special interest group and wealthy donor with deep pockets. [**They 're on a last-minute blitz, and we need to be able to go toe-to-toe with them.**](http://act.floridadems. name: Keren Charles Dongo, Team Kaine Campaign Manager
subject: A note for Derek - why I'm on Tim's team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
| **I'm on Team Kaine because Tim fights for what's right for all Virginians. Pitch in to support his reelection if you're on Team Kaine, too:**

**[DONATE](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vcjN4JVgYpF7ZgW5y%2F14kBHe4PayYyeZ)**
---
Hey --

I've been on Tim Kaine's team for a long time now, and as our campaign to reelect him ramps up, I wanted to share with you a bit about why:

As an African American woman, I care about a lot of issues right now -- like closing the achievement gap, making sure we move forward, not backwards, on civil rights and voting rights issues, protecting a woman's right to make her own health care decisions. **[But what keeps me committed to Tim isn't just that I know he'll fight for those issues. It's his character and his consistency as he works to improve the lives of all Virginians.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=oQQQAU0BF%2FoBb61szKXeKBHe4PayYyeZ)**

In an era where there is a lot of grandstanding from politicians, Tim doesn't talk a big game for TV ratings or social media attention. Instead, he fights consistently for Virginia's families. Whether it's behind the scenes or in the spotlight, he is always focused on simply making people's lives better.

As a civil rights lawyer, he fought discrimination in housing. As Mayor of Richmond, he worked to improve public schools. As Governor, he ensured Virginia was the best place in the country to raise a child and to do business. And as Senator, he's making sure our veterans can find jobs, protecting access to affordable health care, and helping young people get the training they need for a successful future.

**[Simply put, Tim cares about the people in the crowd, not the size of the crowd.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=nWfAa8RZjpgTLI8Ea3ABfRHe4PayYyeZ)**

For all of that -- and because he is one of the most honest, genuine people I've ever met -- I will continue to be on Team Kaine. Will you join me? Our end-of-month deadline is tomorrow, and I want this team to really step up and finish out the month strong.

**[Chip in a few dollars now to show Tim that you're on the team.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=i%2Bj1U2b2UGqVqnmw8tMk5xHe4PayYyeZ)**

**[DONATE](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=8k4g5cr6rSyvTKDGzhGxjRHe4PayYyeZ)**

I really appreciate your support, and I know that Tim does, too.

Keren

Keren Charles Dongo
Campaign Manager | | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=B%2F57wnIfqDV7g7Pr%2Fr%2FnIxHe4PayYyeZ)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=yYI9ZfZHNGCQWUz9K1m3mhHe4PayYyeZ).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

**We need 38 Democrats from your community to step up before tomorrow at midnight if we're going to hit our August fundraising goal. Can you chip in $3 or more today?

name: Scott Arceneaux
subject: Less than a year
body:
#
Team --
It's official: we have less than a year to go before our primary election. If we're going to win and make history together, here's what we need to do:
1. Over the next few months, we need to begin opening satellite offices across the state, so our staff and volunteers can organize voter contact in all 67 counties. We're running this grassroots style -- knocking doors and dialing phones to spread our message.
2. We're going to need to send out mailers to different parts of the state, to remind the voters we contact when our election is, and what issues matter most to us.
3. And finally, since Andrew wasn't already famous, we're going to need to work together to increase his name ID through the radio and other ads.

I've been working to elect Democrats for 16 years now and in that time, I've learned that it doesn't always matter who has the most money, or the backing of the establishment.
We have an inspiring candidate here in Florida with real potential to do some great things for our state, and a real shot to win back our Governor's office for the first time since the 90's. But I'm going to be blunt: we can't do it without you.
[**Will you chip in to our campaign now so we can build a grassroots movement powerful enough to carry us to victory?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b3/9e00690/4f23fa49/24036a63/812210961/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017?refcode=em20170829-sa")
We don't have a whole bunch of wealthy funders to rely on. This is going to come down to you and me and thousands of others coming together to chip in whatever we can afford to make this possible.
I'm all in. I hope you are too.
Bring it home,
Scott Arceneaux
Gillum for Governor

**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b3/9e00690/4f23fa49/24036a63/812210961/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017?refcode=em20170829-sa")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b3/9e00690/4f23fa49/24036a65/812210961/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). name: Samantha Gross (via vanhollen.org)
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __ Did you see Chris' message yesterday? The stakes couldn't be higher and we need to keep focused on taking back the Senate and House. [**Donate now and read his email below.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bd5/70cdc2ba/46905fb0/397de91/3213299047/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augusteom1?refcode=em083017&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Donate+now+and+read+his+email+below&utm_campaign=em083017&source=em083017") \------------- During these first seven months of the Trump administration, I've thought many times that things couldn't get much worse. But after the events of Charlottesville and then his unconscionable pardon of Joe Arpaio, President Trump keeps sinking lower and lower. Every time we think he can't go any lower, he does. Donald Trump's defense of white supremacists and neo-Nazis is not only repugnant, it's a dangerous stance that will likely encourage more violence. His pardon of convicted racial profiler, disgraced former Sheriff Arpaio, sent a signal that Donald Trump will allow people to violate civil rights with impunity. This isn't something that can be swept under the rug. With Congress back in session a week from today, we must take this opportunity to speak out against Donald Trump's divisive rhetoric and policies, as well as those Republicans who simply stand by and refuse to denounce it. The entire world watched in horror as the president unapologetically winked at neo-Nazis, the KKK, and white supremacists. In fact, the United Nations took the extraordinary step of criticizing Trump's failure to condemn racist violence. Meanwhile, Trump is bringing his bigotry to his policymaking: banning patriotic and qualified transgender individuals from the military, threatening to end the DACA program that protects innocent Dreamers from being deported, and pardoning a sheriff who was convicted of criminal contempt for illegally hunting down and detaining immigrants. As we work overtime to prevent Trump from turning back the clock on progress in America, we must build our strength so we can win in next year's mid-term elections. I am proud to lead those efforts in the Senate as the Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and thank you for supporting our efforts. Thanks for your continued generosity, Chris Van Hollen [DONATE HERE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bd5/70cdc2ba/46905fb0/397deae/3213299047/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augusteom1?refcode=em083017&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+HERE&utm_campaign=em083017&source=em083017")

---

---

[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde31/2a380d31/1f27d4a0/fe7ded/1723012008/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
Our thoughts and prayers are with everyone affected by Hurricane Harvey.
Like most of the country, all of us on Team Maggie are watching the news with horror and sadness as unprecedented flooding and rainfall devastates Houston and the surrounding areas.
National and local relief organizations are already on the ground, but as rains continue to hammer the region, your help is needed too.
NPR has put together a list of organizations that are assisting with shelter, food, blood donations, pets, children, and those living with disabilities. [**If you're able, we hope that you'll take a look and help out however you can.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde31/2a380d31/1f27d4a0/fe7dee/1723012008/VEsF/ "http://www.npr.org/sections/thetwo-way/2017/08/28/546745827/looking-to-help-those-affected-by-harvey-here-s-a-list")
If you have already stepped up to help, thank you. And as always, thank you to our first responders for doing everything they can to keep us safe.
Thank you,
Team Maggie
P.S. -- Our records indicate that you are not in the Houston area. However, if Hurricane Harvey has hit you or someone you know, Texas Democrats have compiled a list of resources for you [**here.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde31/2a380d31/1f27d4a0/fe7def/1723012008/VEsC/ "https://www.txdemocrats.org/media/hurricane-harvey-resources/")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde31/2a380d31/1f27d4a0/fe7de8/1723012008/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

---

Peter,

If you or your friends and family have been impacted by Hurricane Harvey, we hope you are OK and staying safe.

The EMILY's List community is made up of millions of people who are known for stepping up to make a positive difference for our country, and that makes me so proud.

We know it will take lots of support to help rebuild what was lost and make Houston, southeast Texas, and other communities affected by Harvey whole, and now is a time where the EMILY's List community can continue to make a positive difference.

**If you would like to help those affected by the hurricane, we encourage you to donate to the Greater Houston Community Foundation's Hurricane Relief Fund:**

**[https://ghcf.org/hurricane-relief/](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6738/24c69fd9/a8a9f33f/189b4fbc/3972383936/VEsE/ "https://ghcf.org/hurricane-relief/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpsghcforghurricanerelief&utm_campaign=WQEF_digital_email_20170830_Harvey_inact&source=WQEF_digital_email_20170830_Harvey_inact")**

Thank you for all you do to support communities across this country,

Ellen R. Malcolm
Founder and Chair of the Board, EMILY's List

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Helping our fellow Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We need to pull together and help the victims in Houston today.

| Friend, The tragedy of Tropical Storm Harvey in Houston is impacting countless people. Our heartfelt response has to be strong and immediate. As we hear more and more stories about the families hurt, trapped, or even killed by this horrific incident, I know we all feel called to help. We are one nation, and we all need to stand together during times like these. It is up to all of us to help our families, friends, and fellow Americans in Texas. **Please, donate today to help relief efforts in Texas in the wake of Tropical Storm Harvey.** **Give what you can to the local organizations, on the ground, helping those affected by this terrible disaster. We 've pulled together some local options here:**
* [**Houston Food Bank**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTE4MTQyNjYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIyMjc2MjIyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
* [**Texas Diaper Bank**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTE4MTQyNjYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIyMjc2MjIyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
* [**Coalition for the Homeless of Houston/Harris County**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTE4MTQyNjYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIyMjc2MjIyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
* [**American Red Cross - Texas**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTE4MTQyNjYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIyMjc2MjIyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
* [**Greater Houston Community Fund**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTE4MTQyNjYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIyMjc2MjIyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Disasters like what we're seeing in Texas cause so much devastation. But they can also inspire the best of us -- they bring us together to lift up our fellow Americans and support one another in our times of need. Today, we must make sure we can keep everyone as safe as possible. Thank you for pitching in. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee
---

| | Friends,

In case you missed it, the [_Associated Press_](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b9d4bf8425&e=1acd9bb3d6) is reporting that after years of lining his pockets with profits he made off of a family-run business that outsourced production south of the border, Democrat Joe Donnelly sold his remaining stock.

While that's seemingly good news, _**the fact is Democrat Donnelly only sold out when he was found out**_. He would have kept cashing dividend checks if this wasn't exposed for all the world to see. And now he expects us to act like it never happened.

Look, robbers can't loot a bank and then get off the hook because they bring the money back. And Democrat Donnelly can't get off the hook just because he sold some stock. That's not how this works.

Democrat Donnelly was doing one thing in Indiana (profiting off outsourcing) while saying another thing in D.C. (that he's supposedly opposed to outsourcing).

_**He's a hypocrite time and time again.**_

If you're tired of Democrat Donnelly's hypocrite ways, [click here to contribute](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b03dfeed41&e=1acd9bb3d6) to our Defeat Democrat Donnelly Fund. Or, if you'd prefer, [click here to share the news](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b0734acb8b&e=1acd9bb3d6) on Facebook or [here to spread the word](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=48d0e39e67&e=1acd9bb3d6) on Twitter.

_**Hoosiers deserve to know the truth about Democrat Donnelly's ways.**_

Sincerely,

The Indiana Republican Party Team

name: Tom Perez
subject: Derek, we need 35 grassroots supporters from your community
body:
Step up before our deadline tomorrow.
---
**We need 35 Democrats from your community to step up by tomorrow at midnight if we're going to hit our August fundraising goal. Can you chip in $3 or more today?

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052365d/4067b0a/3ef7cca39/7e6ec1b8/641961623/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170830_tp_nd&source=em_20170830_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170830_tp_nd")**

I want to be direct with you, Derek: we're being outraised and outspent by the GOP.

There are some fundamental differences about how our two parties raise money. The Republicans can have the President of the United States, the Senate Majority Leader, and the Speaker of the House call up millionaire and billionaire donors, make all kinds of promises, and collect big checks.

But we're powered by folks like you. In fact, as of last month, 70 percent of our contributions this year have come from grassroots supporters who've given less than $200, and our average donation online is $22.

Every penny that grassroots supporters like you have donated has gone towards helping elect more Democrats up and down the ticket all over the country. We've been able to hire more organizers and make a big investment in this year's races in Virginia because of you.

And it's more than just what's in the bank -- what folks like you have given this year is a sign that the grassroots movement we've built together is going strong.

We need to close the fundraising gap with the GOP if we're going to win, and we simply cannot do that without you. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is quickly approaching, and I'm calling on your support. Will you be one of the 35 Democrats from your community we need to pitch in $3 or more to keep powering this party?

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
